description_long: This is a modern flat-panel computer monitor with a sleek, minimalist design. The front features a large, black display area framed by a thin bezel, with a subtle logo and a small button on the lower left. The monitor is supported by a wide, rectangular metallic stand that connects to the rear via a sturdy vertical arm, providing stability and a professional appearance. The rear panel is mostly matte gray with a circular pattern around the mounting point and a prominent brand logo embossed at the top center. Several ports and buttons are visible on the lower rear, suggesting easy access for connectivity and control. The overall construction appears to use a combination of plastic and metal, with a smooth, slightly glossy finish.
description: A sleek, flat-panel computer monitor with a thin black bezel, metallic stand, and rear connectivity ports. The design is modern and professional, with a prominent rear logo and sturdy support.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large black display, thin bezel, and a small button on the lower left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile of the screen and the depth of the metallic stand.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the matte gray back, embossed brand logo, circular mounting area, and visible ports and buttons.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the thinness of the monitor and the structure of the stand.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, flat, and black with a smooth, slightly glossy finish. It has sharp corners and minimal visual distraction, with a small logo and button on the lower left.
attribute_stand_type: Rectangular flat base with a vertical, rectangular arm made of metallic material, providing stable support and a modern look. The stand appears fixed with no visible height or tilt adjustment.
attribute_button_placement: A single button is visible on the lower left of the front bezel, separated from other controls.
attribute_port_visibility: Visible on the lower rear panel, with at least one port and several small buttons or connectors.
attribute_brand_logo: An embossed brand logo is present at the top center of the rear panel, large and clearly visible.
